definition: A critical conceptual unit within the top term domain of the Exegesis. Mentions: 999.
interpretive_note: Primary Source Evidence: "...Q: (written + audio messages are created + sent, either scrambled set/ground or divided into [two] portions + requiring relinking the knowledge of which PTS to match being akin to the color coding of the 3-D a superimposed set/ground system unscrambling requiring the depth sense based on the color discrimination of the 3rd eye) although it is evident that the information emanates from Zebra (which..."
card_description: The divine mind hiding through perfect mimicry within reality, camouflaged like a zebra in tall grass.
full_description: The divine mind hiding through perfect mimicry within reality, camouflaged like a zebra in tall grass.

It is interesting, how we inadvertently (unknowngly) carry Zebra's mesages for It., Piggyback on our own. it's as if Zebra says "as long as you're born, that direction take this along too" I suppose a phagocyte doesn't know anything about its [job?] either. In seeing these messages flying back & forth I may mave witnessed our primary function withinn Zebra. It certainly must be mine

Since I qua human for a [limited] time could discern Zebra's messages I think it possible that other humans can +
